sources.headline: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to Parasyte Universe With Tamiya, Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
sources.summary: Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the Parasyte universe with Parasyte: Tamiya, a new live-action series starring Shioli Kutsuna for Netflix, set to stream in 2027. The series marks another collaboration between Netflix and Yeon ( Hellbound, Parasyte: The Grey ), who developed Parasyte: Tamiya and co-wrote the script with Ryu Yong-jae. sources.headline: Netflix Reteams With Yeon Sang-ho for Parasyte: Tamiya Series
sources.summary: The 'Parasyte: The Grey' follow-up will star Japanese actress Shioli Kutsuna as the original manga's fan-favorite parasite Ryoko Tamiya — a human, a monster and something in between.

topics.title: Michael J. Fox: Returning to Acting 'Really Prolonged My Life'
topics.angle: Michael J. Fox shares how returning to acting has positively impacted his life while continuing his fight against Parkinson's.

sources.headline: Michael J. Fox: Getting Back to Acting Really Prolonged My Life
sources.summary: Thirty-five years after his diagnosis, the Hollywood icon and his foundation are fighting harder than ever to find a cure for Parkinson’s. But with a return to 'Shrinking' confirmed, he’s not giving up his day job anytime soon.
